descFull: Your autonomous engineering team in a CLI. The agent loop produces senior-level code that you can actually trust in prod because of non-negotiable feedback from independent reviewers. Supports Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI with trivial setup.
